name: Christian Vaughn
about: Hi, I'm Christian — a software engineer who started with backend in Typescript with data science in Python on the side. I now work in full-stack with FastAPI, Recat and PHP. For personal projects i love to use ElysiaJS and Svelte.
Outside of work, you'll usually find me with a book, biking around town, at the arcade playing Taiko, or out for live music.
